response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators), and clear leadership in open-source and knowledge-sharing initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience and mobile-platform expertise, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack including mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and testing infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) beyond one project
No mention of roadmap planning, organizational change, or cross-team alignment at scale
